hero.subtitle: Just tell AI what you need — a survey, a registration form, a feedback quiz — and get a polished, ready-to-share form in seconds. No dragging, no dropping, no coding.

features.heading: Forms, reinvented with AI
features.subheading: Stop building forms by hand. Let AI handle the structure, logic, and design.

aiGeneration.title: AI Form Generation
aiGeneration.desc: Describe your form in plain English and AI creates it instantly — fields, logic, and layout included.

smartFields.title: Smart Field Suggestions
smartFields.desc: AI understands context and suggests the right field types, validation rules, and conditional logic.

shareEmbed.title: Instant Share & Embed
shareEmbed.desc: Get a shareable link or embed code the moment your form is ready. Collect responses immediately.

signup.subtitle: Start generating forms with AI

aiSettings.title: AI Configuration
aiSettings.description: Connect your own AI provider and API key for form generation. If not configured, the platform default will be used.
aiSettings.apiKeyHint: Your key is encrypted and stored securely.
aiSettings.cleared: AI settings cleared. Platform default will be used.

verifyRequired.title: Verify your email
verifyRequired.description: You need to verify your email address before using the platform. We sent a link to your inbox — click it to continue.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. No worries — head back and create something new.

forms.blankFormError: Could not create form. Please try again.
forms.noFormsDesc: Create your first form using AI or start from scratch.
forms.responses: {count, plural, =0 {No responses} one {1 response} other {# responses}}
forms.deleteConfirm: This cannot be undone. All responses for this form will be permanently deleted.
forms.deleteTypeInstruction: Type the title below exactly as shown (case-sensitive) to confirm.

generate.title: Create a new form
generate.subtitle: Describe the form you need and AI will generate it for you.
generate.heading: Create a form through conversation
generate.helper: Tell me what you need and I'll ask the right questions to design it with you.
generate.welcome: Hi, I'm your form architect. Describe the form you have in mind and I'll help shape it, one question at a time.
generate.promptHint: Be specific about audience, outcome, and the exact information you need to collect.
generate.straightModeHint: Generate the form immediately from your prompt.
generate.placeholder: Create a customer feedback form for a restaurant with ratings, comment fields, and optional contact details.
generate.error: Failed to generate form. Please try again.

errorBox.title: Something went wrong
errorBox.description: We hit a snag while talking to the AI. Give it another try in a moment.
errorBox.descriptionNetwork: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

composer.refineHint: I'll keep the full context and apply your change
composer.refinePlaceholder: Tell me what to adjust — e.g. make all fields required, add a phone field, or change the tone.
composer.shortcutHint: Enter to send · Shift + Enter for a new line

conversation.continueHint: Review your answers, then continue when you're ready.
conversation.continueReady: All set. Continue when you're ready.
conversation.continueIncomplete: Answer the questions above to continue.

ready.assistantPrompt: That's everything I need to design a solid first draft. Is that all for now, or would you like to add or tweak anything?
ready.addMorePrompt: Got it — share any extra details or tweaks you'd like, and I'll update the plan.
ready.title: Your form is ready
ready.description: I'll assemble the fields and settings as soon as you give the word.
ready.fieldsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No fields yet} one {# field} other {# fields}}
ready.settingsLayout: Layout: {columns, plural, one {# column} other {# columns}} · {width}

preview.title: Your form blueprint
preview.emptyDescription: As we discuss the details, I'll sketch the form structure on this side.
preview.generatingDescription: Assembling the fields and settings you confirmed.
preview.readyDescription: Click Generate when you're ready to open the builder.

planning.modeHint: I'll ask follow-up questions and refine before generating.
planning.answerPrompt: A few details to refine this form
planning.readyMessage: Perfect, I have enough to build a great first draft.

resume.externalEditPrompt: Heads up — this form was edited outside of chat since we last talked. I pulled in the current version above. What would you like to change next?
resume.newChatFromFormPrompt: Here is the current form. What would you like to change or add?
resume.chatsPageDescription: Jump back into any previous form-building conversation.
resume.chatsEmptyDescription: Start a new conversation to build your first form.

editor.title: Edit Form
editor.noFields: No fields yet. Add one or generate with AI.

publishing.title: Publishing
publishing.description: Control when respondents can access your form.
publishing.modeScheduledDesc: Choose a date and time for automatic publishing.
publishing.helper: Your form will automatically go live at the selected time.
publishing.previousSchedule: The previously scheduled publish time will be ignored.
publishing.currentlyLive: Your form is live and accepting responses.
publishing.willSchedule: Will be published at the scheduled time.
publishing.pickDateHint: Pick a date and time to schedule.

access.title: Access Control
access.description: Decide who can submit a response.
access.publicDesc: No restrictions — anyone who has the link can respond.
access.domainsDesc: Restrict submissions to emails from approved domains.
access.invalidDomain: Enter a valid domain like company.com
access.hint: Only users with these email domains can submit the form.
access.noEmailFieldWarning: Add an email field to the form so we can verify respondents' domains.

share.description: Get the form in front of your respondents.
share.draftNotice: Publish the form to activate this link for respondents.

share.successMessage: Form sent to {sent, plural, one {# recipient} other {# recipients}}

notifications.dailySummaryDesc: One concise digest with every response from the day.
